hadiths.ar:
]ح و أز  أشت عمال ش عر ألج ن ر ي ر [ 
4224  -  وَّ رَّوَّى جَّن َّان ُّ ن ْن ُّ سَّذِي زٍ عَّن ْ ن ُّزْذٍ إَّلْأ ِسْكَّاف ِ ق َّالَّ : ق ُّلْث ُّ لِأ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إ ِن ِّى  ر ج ُّل  ج َّز َّإر   وَّ لأَّ 
ي َّسْي َّق ِي مُّ عَّمَّلُّن َّا إ ِلأ َّ ن ِس َّعْزِ إَّلْح ِن ْز ِي زِ ن َّح ْزُّر ُّ ن ِهِ ق َّال ق ِى  ق َّح  َّارَّة ٍ ي ُّم َّ إ َّوْق ِذْ ي َّحْي َّهَّا جَّي  َّى ي ُّذ ْهِث َّ 
ذَّسَّمَّهُّ ي ُّم َّ إِعْمَّلْ ن ِهِ
hadiths.en:
And Al-Ala’ narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim from one of the Imams  {a.s} 
who said: "I asked him about the vessels of the People of the Book."  
Imam {a.s} said: "Do not eat in their vessels if they eat in them the dead (carrion), blood, 
or the flesh of swine." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.348 
﴿HADITH ﴾ 
THE PERMISSIBILITY OF USING PIG HAIR.

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4223
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٢٣

hadiths.ar:
4225  -  وَّ ق ِى  رِوَّإي َّه ِ عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ ن ْن ِ إَّلْمُّع ِي زَّة ِ عَّن ْ ن ُّزْذٍ ق َّالَّ : ق ُّلْث ُّ لِأ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ج ُّعِلْث ُّ ق ِذَّإك َّ إ ِن  َّا ن َّعْمَّلُّ  
ن ِس َّعْزِ إَّلْح ِن ْز ِي زِ ق َّزُّن  َّمَّا ن َّسِى َّ إَّلز َّج ُّلُّ ق َّصَّل َّى وَّ ق ِى  ي َّذِةِ مِن ْهُّ س َّى ْء  ق َّق َّال  وَّ ق ِى  ي َّذِةِ مِن ْهُّ س َّى ْء 
ق َّال  ذَّسَّم  ق َّلاَّ ي َّعْمَّلُّوإ ن ِهِ وَّ مَّا لَّمْ ي َّكُّن ْ لَّهُّ ذَّسَّم  ق َّاعْمَّلُّوإ ن ِهِ وَّ إِع ْسِلُّوإ إ َّي ْذِي َّكُّمْ مِن ْه
hadiths.en:
And Hanan ibn Sadeer narrated from Burd al -Iskafi who said: 
I said to Abu Abdullah {a.s}: 'I am a shoemaker, and our work cannot be done without 
using pig hair to sew with.' 
Imam {a.s} said: 'Take a single bristle from it and place it in a clay pot, then light a fire 
underneath it until its grease is removed. After that, you may work with it.' " 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.348 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.9 p.84 • Al-Wafi, Vol.6 p.205 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.228 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.24 p.237 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4224
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٢٤

hadiths.ar:
]أي  ج اد  ألع ن م و ألط ت ر [ 
4226  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلْحَّسَّن ُّ ن ْن ُّ مَّحْن ُّوب ٍ عَّن ْ مُّحَّم َّذِ ن ْن ِ مَّارِذٍ ق َّالَّ سَّمِعْث ُّ إ َّن َّا عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ي َّق ول 
مُّو ْمِن ٍ ي َّكُّون ُّ لَّهُّ ق ِى  مَّن ْز ِلِهِ عَّن ْز   جَّلُّوب   إ ِلأ َّ ق ُّذِّسَّ إ َّهْلُّ ذ َّلِك َّ إَّلْمَّن ْز ِلِ وَّ ن ُّورِك َّ عَّلَّي ْهِ مْ ق َّا ِن ْ كَّان َّث ِ إِي ْن َّي َّي ْن ِ ق ُّذِّسُّوإ كُّل َّ ي َّوْمٍ 
مَّز َّي َّي ْن ِ ب َّ إ ِذَّإمُّكُّمْ 
ق َّمَّا مَّعْن َّى ق ُّذِّسْي ُّمْ ق َّال
hadiths.en:
And in the narration of Abdullah ibn al-Mughirah from Burd, he said: 
I said to Abu Abdullah {a.s}: 'May I be your ransom! We work with pig hair, and sometimes 
a man forgets and prays while having something of it in his hand.'  
Imam {a.s} said: 'It is not proper for him to pray while having something of it in his hand.' 
And Imam {a.s} also said: 'Take it and wash it. If it has grease, do not use it. But if it does 
not have grease, then you may use it, and wash your hands after handling it.' " 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.349 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.9 p.85 • Al-Wafi, Vol.6 p.205 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.228 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.24 p.237 
﴿HADITH ﴾ 
RAISING SHEEP AND BIRDS

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4225
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٢٥

hadiths.ar:
4227  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ إ َّمِي زُّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ عَّلِى  ُّ ن ْن ُّ إ َّن ِى  طَّالِث ٍ صَّلَّوَّإب ُّ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ «
إ َّمْوَّإلِكُّمْ
hadiths.en:
Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Muhammad ibn Marid, who said:  
"I heard Abu Abdullah {a.s}, say: 'There is no believer who has a milking goat in his house 
except that the people of that house are sanctified and blessed. If there are two goats, 
they are sanctified twice each day.' 
A man from our companions then asked: 'How are they sanctified?' 
Imam {a.s} replied: 'It is said to them: Blessed are you, and may your food be pure and 
wholesome.' 
I said: 'What is the meaning of being sanctified?' 
Imam {a.s} said: 'It means you are purified.'" 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.349 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.24 p.429 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4226
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٢٦

hadiths.ar: 4228 - وَّ س َّكَّا رَّج ُّل  إ ِلَّى إَّلن  َّن ِى ِّ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ إَّلْوَّجْس َّه ق َّا َّمَّزَّةُّ ن ِاي ِّح َّاذ ِ ر َّوْح ِ جَّمَّامٍ
hadiths.en:
Commander of the Faithful, Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s}, said: 
"Fear Allah {SWT} regarding what He {SWT} has entrusted to you, and regarding the 'Ajm' 
among your possessions." 
Imam {a.s} was asked: "What is meant by 'Ajm'?" 
Imam {a.s} replied: "It refers to sheep, cattle, pigeons, and similar animals." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.349 • Al-Wafi, Vol.20 p.852 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.11 
p.518 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.61 p.119 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4227
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٢٧

hadiths.ar: 4229 - وَّ ق َّالَّ إ َّمِي زُّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم
hadiths.en:
A man complained to the Prophet {saws} about feeling lonely.  
The Prophet {saws} instructed him: "Keep a pair of pigeons." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.350 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.73 p.162 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4228
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٢٨

hadiths.ar:
]كرأهه  ب هك  ألعط ام [ 
4230   -  وَّ رُّوِى َّ عَّن ْ عَّلِى ِّ ن ْن ِ إ َّسْن َّاطٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِي هِ ق َّالَّ صَّن َّغَّ لَّن َّا إ َّن ُّو جَّمْز َّة َّ طَّعَّاماً وَّ ن َّحْن ُّ ج َّمَّاعَّه   ق َّلَّم َّا ج ص َّزُّوإ رَّإ َّى إ َّن ُّو 
جَّمْز َّة َّ رَّج ُّلاً ي َّن ْهَّك ُّ عَّط ْماً ق َّصَّاحَّ ن ِهِ وَّ ق َّالَّ لأَّ ي َّق ْعَّلْ ق َّا ِن ِّى  سَّمِعْث ُّ عَّلِى  َّ ن ْن َّ إَّلْحُّسَّي ْ ن ِ عَّلَّي ْهِمَّا إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ي َّق ُّول 
إَّلْعِط َّامَّ ق َّا ِن  َّ لِلْح ِن ِّ ق ِي هَّا ن َّصِي ن اً ق َّا ِن ْ ق َّعَّلْي ُّمْ ذ َّهَّث َّ مِن َّ إَّلْن َّي ْث ِ مَّا هُّوَّ ج َّي ْز  لَّكُّمْ مِن ْ ذ َّلِك
hadiths.en:
Commander of the Faithful, peace be upon him, said:  
"Indeed, the fluttering of pigeons' wings drives away the devils." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.350 • Al-Wafi, Vol.20 p.856 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.11 
p.517 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.11 p.518 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.73 p.162 
﴿HADITH ﴾ 
THE DISLIKE OF GNAWING BONES

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4229
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٢٩

hadiths.ar:
4231  -  وَّ ق ِي لَّ لِلص َّاذِق ِ ج َّعْق َّزِ ن ْن ِ مُّحَّم َّذٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم ن َّلَّع َّن َّا إ َّن  َّ رَّسُّولَّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ ق َّال 
وَّ ي َّعَّالَّى لَّي ُّن ْع ِض ُّ إَّلْن َّي ْث َّ إَّلل َّحِمَّ وَّ إَّلل َّحِمَّ إَّلس َّمِي ن حْمَّ وَّ ن ُّحِن  ُّهُّ وَّ إ ِن  َّمَّا عَّ ن َّى عَّلَّي ْهِ 
إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إَّلْن َّي ْث َّ إَّل َّذ ِى  ي ُّو ْكَّلُّ ق ِي هِ لُّحُّومُّ إَّلن  َّاسِ ن ِالْع ِي ن َّه ِ وَّ عَّن َّى ن ِالل َّحِمِ إَّلس َّمِي ن ِ إَّلْمُّي َّن َّح ْي ِ زَّ إَّلْمُّح ْي َّالَّ ق ِى  مِس ْي َّي ِهِ
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Ali ibn Asbat, from his father, who said:  
"Abu Hamzah prepared food for us while we were a group. When the food was served, 
Abu Hamzah noticed a man excessively gnawing on a bone.  
He shouted at him and said:  
‘Do not do that! For I heard Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain {a.s} say:  
‘Do not excessively gnaw on bones, for the jinn have a share in them. And if you do so, 
something better for you than that will depart from your house.'"  
[REFERENCES] Al-Muhasin, Vol.2 p.472 • Al-Kafi, V.6 p.322 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, V.3 p.350 • Al-Wafi, 
Vol.20 p.487 • Bihar Al-Anwar, V.63 p.72 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.63 p.426 • Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.16 p.309 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4230
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٣٠

hadiths.ar:
4232   -  وَّ رَّوَّى جَّزِي ز   عَّن ْ ر ُّرَّإرَّة َّ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم  إ لِهِ ن َّهَّى إ َّن ْ ي ُّو ْكَّلَّ 
إَّلل َّحْمُّ ع َّزِي ص اً ي َّعْن ِى  ن ِي ن اً وَّ ق َّال  جَّي  َّى ي ُّع َّي ِّزَّةُّ إَّلس  َّمْسُّ إ َّوِ إَّلن  َّارُّ.
hadiths.en:
It was said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s}: 
"We have heard that the Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace and blessings be upon him and 
his family, said: 'Indeed, Allah {SWT}, the Blessed and Exalted, despises the house filled 
with meat and the fattened meat.'” 
So Imam {a.s} replied: "We eat meat and love it. What the Prophet, peace be upon him, 
meant was the house where the flesh of people is consumed through backbiting. And 
by 'fattened meat,' he meant the one who is arrogant and boastful in his walk."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, V.3 p.350 • Al-Wafi, Vol.19 p.285 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.25 p.37 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4231
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٣١

hadiths.ar: 4233 - وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم إَّلْحَّي  َّاب ِ س َّى ْء
hadiths.en:
Hariz narrated from Zurara, from Abu Ja’far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir 
{a.s} that the Messenger of Allah {SWT} prohibited eating meat raw, meaning uncooked.  
The Prophet {saws} said: "It is only eaten by wild beasts."  
Hariz said: "This means until it is altered by the sun or fire."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.350 • Al-Wafi, Vol.19 p.295 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4232
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٣٢

hadiths.ar:
4234  -  وَّ سَّا َّلَّ إَّلْحَّلَّن ِى  ُّ إ َّن َّا عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ : عَّن ْ ق َّي ْلِ إَّلْحَّي  َّاب ِ ق َّق َّال ي َّح ِذُّةُّ ق ِى  إَّلْن َّزِّي  َّه ِ إ ِلأ َّ 
إَّلْح َّان ذَّ عَّلَّى عَّهْذِ رَّسُّولِ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى  
إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ ق َّالَّث ْ مَّن ْ ق َّي َّلَّ عَّامِزَّ ن َّي ْث ٍ إ َّصَّان َّهُّ كَّذ َّإ وَّ كَّذ َّإ ق َّق َّ الَّ رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ 
مَّح َّاق َّه َّ ي َّن ِعَّاي ِهِن  َّ ق َّلَّي ْسَّ مِن ِّى  وَّ إ ِن  َّمَّا ي َّي ْزُّكُّهَّا لِأ َّن  َّهَّا لأَّ ي ُّزِي ذُّك  ق ِى  ن ُّي ُّوي ِهِن
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: 
"No type of crow, whether a 'Zagh' or any other kind, is permissible to eat, and nothing 
from snakes is permissible to eat." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.351 • Al -Wafi, Vol.19 p.61 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.24 
p.127 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4233
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٣٣

hadiths.ar:
4235  -  وَّ رَّوَّى مُّوسَّى ن ْن ُّ ن َّكْزٍ إَّلْوَّإسِطِى  ُّ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى إَّلْحَّسَّن ِ مُّوسَّى ن ْن ِ ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِمَّا إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّالَّ سَّمِعْي ُّهُّ ي َّق ُّولُّ :  
«لْن َّي ْض ِ ي َّز ِي ذُّ ق ِى  إَّلْوَّلَّذِ وَّ مَّا 
إِسْي َّس ْ ق َّى مَّزِي ض   ن ِمِي ْلِ إَّلْعَّسَّلِ وَّ مَّن ْ إ َّذْج َّلَّ ج َّوْق َّهُّ لُّق ْمَّه َّ س َّحْمٍ إ َّج ْزَّج َّث ْ مِي ْلَّهَّا مِن َّ إَّلذ َّإءِ
hadiths.en:
Al-Halabi asked Abu Abdullah {a.s} about killing snakes. 
Imam {a.s} said: "Kill everything you find in the wilderness except the jinn." 
And he forbade killing the household spirits (ʿAwamir) and said: 
"Do not leave them out of fear of their consequences, for the Jews during the time of 
the Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace be upon him and his family, used to say that 
whoever killed a household spirit would suffer such-and-such misfortune." 
Then the Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace be upon him and his family, said: 
"Whoever refrains from killing them out of fear of their consequences is not from me. 
Rather, leave them alone because they do not intend to harm you."  
Imam {a.s} also said: "I sometimes killed them in their houses." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.351 • Al-Wafi, Vol.19 p.261 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.23 
p.397 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.61 p.260 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4234
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON HUNTING AND SLAUGHTERING
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٩٣، ح ٤٢٣٤

hadiths.en:
Musa ibn Bakr al-Wasiti narrated from Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-
Kadhim {a.s} that he said: 
"Meat nourishes the flesh, and fish melts the body. Gourd increases intelligence, and 
eating eggs frequently increases offspring. No sick person has sought healing with 
anything better than honey. And whoever consumes a morsel of fat expels an equal 
amount of illness from his body." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.351 • Al-Wafi, Vol.19 p.287

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 93, H. 4235

hadiths.chapter: 94. CHAPTER ON EATING AND DRINKING FROM GOLD
hadiths.ar: 4237 - وَّ رَّوَّى إ َّن َّان   عَّن ْ مُّحَّم َّذِ ن ْن ِ مُّسْلِمٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال
hadiths.en:
Sama'ah narrated  from Abu Abdullah  Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq 
{a.s}, who said: 
"It is not proper to drink from vessels made of silver and gold."  
[REFERENCES] Al-Muhasin, Vol.2 p.582 • Al-Kafi, Vol.6 p.385 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.352 • Al-
Wafi, Vol.20 p.575 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.3 p.507 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.63 p.529 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.63 
p.537 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 94, H. 4236

hadiths.chapter: 94. CHAPTER ON EATING AND DRINKING FROM GOLD
hadiths.ar:
4238 - وَّ رَّوَّى ي َّعْلَّن َّه ُّ عَّن ْ ن ُّزَّي ْذٍ إَّلْعِح ْلِى ِّ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم  
« إَّلْمُّس ْظُّ كَّذ َّلِك َّ ق َّا ِن ْ لَّمْ 
ي َّح ِذْ ن ُّذ إً مِن َّ إَّلس  ُّزْب ِ ق ِى  إَّلْق َّذَّحِ إَّلْمُّق َّص  َّض ِ عَّذَّلَّ ن ِق َّمِهِ عَّن ْ مَّوْص ِغِ إَّلْق ِص  َّ ه ِ
hadiths.en:
Aban narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Ja’far Imam 
Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s}, who said: "Do not eat from vessels made of gold or 
silver." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Muhasin, Vol.2 p.582 • Al-Kafi, Vol.6 p.267 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.352 • 
Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.9 p.90 • Al-Wafi, Vol.20 p.493 • Al-Wafi, Vol.20 p.494 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.3 p.506 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.3 p.508 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.24 p.231 • Al-Fusul Al-Muhimmah, Vol.2 p.58 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 94, H. 4237

hadiths.chapter: 94. CHAPTER ON EATING AND DRINKING FROM GOLD
hadiths.en:
Thalabah narrated from Burayd al -Ijli, from Abu Abdullah  Imam Jafar ibn 
Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s}: 
"Imam {a.s} disliked drinking from silver vessels and from cups plated with silver.  
Imam {a.s} also disliked applying oil from a silver -plated container and using a comb 
that is silver-plated.  
However, if one has no choice but to drink from a silver-plated cup, he should turn his 
mouth away from the part that is plated with silver."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.352 • Al-Wafi, Vol.20 p.576

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 94, H. 4238

hadiths.chapter: 94. CHAPTER ON EATING AND DRINKING FROM GOLD AND SILVER UTENSILS AND OTHER ETIQUETTES OF
hadiths.ar:
4240  -  وَّ رَّوَّى ي ُّون ُّسُّ ن ْن ُّ ي َّعْق ُّوب َّ عَّن ْ ي ُّوسُّف َّ إ َّج ِي هِ : إ َّن  َّ إ َّن َّا عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إِسْي َّسْق َّى مَّاءً ق َّا ي ِى َّ ن ِق َّذَّحٍ مِن ْ 
صُّق ْزٍ ق ِي هِ مَّاء  ق َّق َّالَّ لَّهُّ ن َّعْض ُّ ج ُّلَّسَّان ِهِ إ ِن  َّ عَّن  َّاذَّ إَّلْن َّصْزِى  َّ ي َّكْزَّةُّ إَّلس  ُّزْب َّ ق ِى  إَّلص ُّق ْزِ ق َّال
hadiths.en:
The Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said: 
"Vessels of gold and silver are the possessions of those who do not have certainty (in 
faith)." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Muhasin, Vol.2 p.582 • Al-Kafi, Vol.6 p.268 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.353 • Al-
Ash’athiyat, Vol.1 p.185 • Tahdhib Al -Ahkam, Vol.9 p.91 • Al-Nawadir (Lil-Rawandi), Vol.1 p.12 • Al-Wafi, 
Vol.20 p.494 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.3 p.507 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.3 p.508 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.24 
p.231 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 94, H. 4239

hadiths.chapter: 94. CHAPTER ON EATING AND DRINKING FROM GOLD AND SILVER UTENSILS AND OTHER ETIQUETTES OF
hadiths.en:
Yunus bin Yaqub narrated from his brother Yusuf: 
Abu Abdullah {a.s}, once asked for water, and a vessel made of brass containing water 
was brought to him.  
One of those sitting with him said: "‘Abbad al -Basri dislikes drinking from brass 
vessels."  
Imam {a.s} said: "Then ask him, is it gold or silver?" 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.353 • Tahdhib Al -Ahkam, Vol.9 p.92 • Al-Wafi, Vol.20 
p.577 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 94, H. 4240

hadiths.chapter: 94. CHAPTER ON EATING AND DRINKING FROM GOLD AND SILVER UTENSILS AND OTHER ETIQUETTES OF
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Jarrah Al-Mada'ini: 
Abu Abdullah {a.s}, disliked that a man should eat with his left hand, drink with it, or take 
anything with it. 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.353 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.25 p.270

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 94, H. 4241

hadiths.chapter: 94. CHAPTER ON EATING AND DRINKING FROM GOLD AND SILVER UTENSILS AND OTHER ETIQUETTES OF
hadiths.ar: 4243 - وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم لِلْعِزْق ِ وَّ إ َّق ْوَّى لِلْن َّذَّن ِ
hadiths.en:
It is narrated by Abdullah bin Maymoon, from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn 
Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir {a.s}: 
The companions of the Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace be upon him and his family, 
were drinking water in large gulps at Tabuk.  
So the Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace be upon him and his family, said:  
"Drink with your hands, for they are among the best of your vessels."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, V.3 p.353 • Al-Wafi, V.20 p.565 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.25 p.259 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 94, H. 4242
